name: career-agent
description: Agentic job application workflow. Generates tailored CV + cover letter PDFs per role and fills ATS forms via browser automation. Handoff to user for EEO fields and Submit.
author: YOUR_GITHUB_USERNAME

skills.name: apply
skills.description: Fill an ATS job application form, upload tailored CV + cover letter, answer custom questions, and hand off to user for EEO fields and Submit.

role_id.description: The role_id from your roles/ config (e.g. stripe_backend_2026)

skills.name: generate-cv
skills.description: Generate an ATS-optimised CV PDF and cover letter PDF for a specific role from profile.json and the role config.

role_id.description: The role_id from your roles/ config

skills.name: new-role
skills.description: Interactively scaffold a new role JSON config by asking for the JD URL, scraping the job description, and proposing a tailored config with CV variant selection.

claude-in-chrome.description: Required for browser-based form filling. Install the Claude in Chrome extension and connect it to Cowork or Claude Code.

steps: Copy profile.example.json → profile.json and fill in your details
Copy roles.example/example_role.json → roles/<role_id>.json for each role

dataFiles.profile.json: Your personal data — gitignored, never committed
dataFiles.roles/*.json: Your role configs — gitignored, never committed
